name: Chicken Ala Vineyard
recipeIngredient: 4 Half chicken breasts, boned and skinned, about 1 1/4 lbs total
1 tbsp Olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken breast in half, lengthwise.
2. Mix together salt, basil, tarragon, paprika, white pepper, and flour. Toss with chicken strips, saving any excess seasoned flour.
3. Heat oil in a skillet. Add chicken and cook over moderately high heat until golden brown; turn and brown the other side.
4. Add garlic and sprinkle on any leftover seasoned flour. Add broth, vinegar, and lemon juice; cover and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add grapes and cook, uncovered, for 5 minutes longer or just until chicken is tender.
6. Remove chicken and grapes to a heated serving platter. Boil the pan liquid for 1 minute and pour over chicken.
7. Sprinkle with parsley. Makes 4 servings.
Nutritional Information per Serving: 276 calories; 8 grams fat; 32 grams protein; 19 grams carbohydrates; 77 milligrams cholesterol; 84 milligrams sodium; 1 gram dietary fiber.
